step_rationale: Systemic inflammatory biomarker; non-plaque-specific acute-phase response in MI.
mechanism: Procalcitonin is a systemic inflammatory marker elevated in MI-associated infection and ischemic stress, off the atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: A Review of Novel Cardiac Biomarkers in Acute or Chronic Cardiovascular Diseases: The Role of Soluble ST2 (sST2), Lipoprotein-Associated Phospholipase A2 (Lp-PLA2), Myeloperoxidase (MPO), and Procalcitonin (PCT).
[Early and late mortality of patients with community acquired pneumonia].
The value of procalcitonin, a novel inflammatory marker, in the diagnosis of myocardial infarction and evaluation of acute coronary syndrome patients.
